title: FM Logistic India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: FM Logistic India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!
